Test Name: sRGB color checker patches match expected RGB values
Action: Samples pixels at patch coordinates and computes CIE76 Delta-E against expected sRGB values (threshold ≤ 5)
Description: Reads the sRGB color checker image and its companion JSON file containing known patch coordinates and expected RGB values. Samples the actual pixel color at each coordinate using sharp, then computes the CIE76 Delta-E perceptual color difference between expected and actual. Fails if any patch exceeds a Delta-E of 5.
Failure Means: Color shifts introduced by re-encoding or profile mismatches

Test Name: Adobe RGB color checker patches within Delta-E of sRGB targets
Action: Same patch sampling with wider gamut tolerance (threshold ≤ 25) for Adobe RGB color space conversion
Description: Reads the Adobe RGB color checker image and its JSON file listing sRGB-converted target values. Samples pixels at each patch coordinate and computes Delta-E against the sRGB targets. Uses a wider threshold of 25 to account for gamut mapping differences.
Failure Means: Wider-gamut images produce wildly wrong colors after conversion to sRGB

Test Name: ProPhoto RGB color checker patches within Delta-E of sRGB targets
Action: Same patch sampling with wider gamut tolerance (threshold ≤ 25) for ProPhoto RGB gamut
Description: Same approach as CL-02 but for ProPhoto RGB, the widest gamut commonly used by cameras. Checks Delta-E ≤ 25.
Failure Means: ProPhoto gamut conversion produces extreme color drift

Test Name: Custom ICC profile image has embedded ICC profile
Action: Checks that sharp detects an ICC profile in the image metadata
Description: Opens the custom ICC profile image with sharp and inspects its metadata to confirm an ICC profile buffer is present.
Failure Means: Pipeline strips custom ICC profiles during processing

Test Name: Untagged image has no embedded ICC profile
Action: Confirms no ICC profile is present in the untagged fixture
Description: Opens the untagged image with sharp and confirms the ICC metadata field is falsy. Negative control for CL-04.
Failure Means: Test fixture is invalid (has profile when it shouldn't)

Test Name: CMYK image is detected as CMYK color space
Action: Verifies metadata.space === cmyk
Description: Opens the CMYK test image with sharp and checks that metadata.space reports 'cmyk'.
Failure Means: CMYK images misidentified — would break downstream conversion tests

Test Name: 16-bit gradient has smooth tonal transitions
Action: Measures mean adjacent pixel difference along the middle row (must be < 5)
Description: Reads the 16-bit TIFF gradient image, converts to 8-bit greyscale, walks across the middle row measuring adjacent pixel differences. Mean must be < 5.
Failure Means: Banding from bit-depth reduction or aggressive compression

Test Name: Black and white point pixels match expected values
Action: Samples black/white/midgray patches at known coordinates (Delta-E ≤ 5)
Description: Reads the black/white test image and its JSON file. Samples RGB at each coordinate and computes Delta-E against expected values.
Failure Means: Level shifts where blacks get lifted or whites get crushed

Test Name: Grayscale ramp steps match expected luminance values
Action: Samples 11 grayscale steps and compares measured luminance to expected values (tolerance ≤ 15)
Description: Reads the 11-step grayscale ramp image and its JSON file. Samples pixels, computes weighted luminance, compares against expected.
Failure Means: Gamma curve errors or tone mapping issues

Test Name: Saturated color patches match expected RGB values
Action: Samples R/G/B/C/M/Y patches (Delta-E ≤ 5)
Description: Reads the saturated patches image. Samples actual pixels and computes Delta-E against expected RGB values.
Failure Means: Desaturation or hue rotation in fully saturated colors

Test Name: Image renders and screenshot matches baseline at each tier
Action: Loads image at each viewport size, takes screenshot, compares against saved baseline
Description: Opens browser at each SmugMug tier viewport size (Ti through O), injects test image as data URL, verifies it renders (naturalWidth > 0), then compares screenshot against saved baseline PNG.
Expected Values: Pixel-perfect match against baselines in tests/baselines/
Failure Means: Browser rendering regression — images display differently than expected

Test Name: JPEG quality preserved at each CDN size tier
Action: Uploads JPEG and computes SSIM per tier against locally resized version
Description: Uploads quality-detail.jpg (62MB). Waits for tier generation. For each tier (S through 5K): downloads from CDN, resizes source locally to same dimensions at Q95, computes SSIM. Both images normalized to identical pixel grid before comparison.
Failure Means: A specific tier is over-compressed or serving wrong content — visible quality degradation

Test Name: Original download matches uploaded file
Action: Compares ArchivedSize against source file byte count and verifies ArchivedUri present
Description: Uploads quality-detail.jpg. Reads ArchivedSize from API and asserts it matches source file byte count exactly (62519806 bytes). Verifies ArchivedUri is present.
Failure Means: Pipeline silently re-encodes or modifies the original — photographer's master copy altered

Test Name: REMOVED — merged into IQ-02
Action: Test removed — redundant with IQ-02 ArchivedSize check
Description: This test was identical to the ArchivedSize assertion already in IQ-02. Removed to eliminate redundancy.
Failure Means: N/A

Test Name: No double-compression on JPEG uploads
Action: Waits for tiers then compares SSIM against locally resized Q95 using actual downloaded dimensions
Description: Uploads quality-detail.jpg. Waits for L tier. Downloads it and reads actual dimensions. Resizes source locally to those exact dimensions at Q95. Computes SSIM.
Failure Means: Double-compression artifacts from re-encoding an already-compressed JPEG

Test Name: PNG served losslessly at original size
Action: Checks ArchivedSize matches source file byte count
Description: Uploads quality-reference.png (132MB). Reads ArchivedSize from API. Asserts exact match with source byte count. Verifies ArchivedUri present.
Failure Means: PNG originals converted to lossy format during storage

Test Name: REMOVED — panoramic PNG tier comparison not meaningful
Action: Test removed
Description: The 132MB panoramic PNG (16592x5352) produced tiers that SmugMug may crop differently than a proportional resize. SSIM comparison was not meaningful.
Failure Means: N/A

Test Name: GIF upload preserves original
Action: Uploads GIF and verifies ArchivedUri MD5 matches source
Description: Uploads quality-reference.gif (22KB). Downloads archived file. Computes MD5 hex hash and compares against source.
Failure Means: GIF re-encoded or converted — would break animations

Test Name: HEIC upload produces viewable JPEG conversion
Action: Uploads HEIC and verifies valid JPEG tier; SSIM check if HEIC decode available
Description: Uploads quality-reference.heic (2.3MB). Waits for tiers. Downloads L/XL tier. Verifies JPEG magic bytes and positive dimensions. If sharp can decode HEIC locally: computes SSIM against locally-converted reference.
Expected Values: Valid JPEG at ~450x600; SSIM >= 0.9 when available
Failure Means: HEIC conversion broken — iPhone photos show as broken images

Test Name: High-ISO image doesn't gain artifacts after resize
Action: Uploads noisy image and compares L tier SSIM against locally resized version
Description: Uploads quality-noisy.jpg (16MB high-ISO). Gets L tier dimensions. Downloads it. Resizes source locally to same dimensions. Computes SSIM.
Failure Means: Resize pipeline amplifies noise or adds sharpening halos

Test Name: Image sharpness maintained after resize
Action: Uploads resolution chart and measures Laplacian variance on M and L tiers (threshold > 500)
Description: Uploads quality-resolution-chart.jpg (1.3MB fine-line chart). Downloads M and L tiers. Computes Laplacian variance on each.
Failure Means: Resize pipeline over-smooths fine detail — text and edges become blurry

Test Name: Each CDN tier serves correct pixel dimensions
Action: Downloads each tier and verifies actual dimensions match !sizedetails
Description: Uploads c-sizing-landscape.jpg (6000x4000). For each tier: downloads actual image, reads dimensions with sharp, asserts match against API-reported values (±1px).
Failure Means: API reports wrong dimensions or CDN serves wrong-sized images

Test Name: Aspect ratio preserved across all tiers
Action: Compares each tier's aspect ratio against OriginalWidth/OriginalHeight
Description: Computes source ratio (1.5:1). For each non-original tier, computes tier ratio. Asserts drift <= 0.02. Skips square-cropped Ti/Th.
Failure Means: Cropping or stretching introduced during resize

Test Name: Landscape image longest edge matches tier spec
Action: Verifies each tier's longest edge matches expected pixel spec (±1px)
Description: Queries !sizedetails. For each tier, compares longest edge against expected spec.
Failure Means: Tier generation using wrong target dimensions

Test Name: Portrait image longest edge matches tier spec
Action: Uploads 4000x6000 portrait, verifies height >= width at every tier
Description: Uploads c-sizing-portrait.jpg. For each non-original tier, asserts height >= width.
Failure Means: Orientation-unaware resize treats all images as landscape

Test Name: Square image both edges match tier spec
Action: Uploads 5000x5000 square, verifies width === height at every tier
Description: Uploads c-sizing-square.jpg. For each non-original tier, asserts width === height.
Failure Means: Rounding errors break 1:1 aspect ratio

Test Name: Panoramic image sizing preserves aspect ratio
Action: Uploads 12000x2000 panoramic, checks ratio drift per tier
Description: Uploads c-sizing-panoramic.jpg (6:1 ratio). Checks ratio drift <= 0.1 per tier.
Failure Means: Extreme aspect ratios cropped or padded

Test Name: Very tall image sizing preserves aspect ratio
Action: Uploads 2000x10000 tall image, checks ratio drift per tier
Description: Uploads c-sizing-tall.jpg (1:5 ratio). Checks ratio drift <= 0.1 per tier.
Failure Means: Extreme portrait images truncated or padded

Test Name: Small source not upscaled beyond original
Action: Uploads 400x300 image, verifies no tier exceeds 400x300
Description: Uploads c-sizing-small.jpg. Asserts every tier width <= 400 and height <= 300.
Failure Means: CDN generates blurry upscaled versions larger than source

Test Name: !largestimage returns highest available dimensions
Action: Queries !largestimage and verifies it's actually the largest tier available
Description: Queries !largestimage and !sizedetails. Asserts no other tier has a larger longest edge than what !largestimage reports.
Failure Means: Clients get smaller image than what's actually available

Test Name: OriginalWidth/Height match source file
Action: Compares API OriginalWidth/OriginalHeight against sharp metadata of source
Description: Reads source dimensions with sharp. Queries API. Asserts exact match.
Failure Means: Dimension reporting bug breaks client layout calculations

Test Name: OriginalSize matches source file byte count
Action: Compares API OriginalSize against source file byte count
Description: Reads source byte count. Queries API. Asserts exact match.
Failure Means: File size reporting error breaks download progress indicators

Test Name: Orientations 1-4 served as landscape
Action: Uploads all 8 orientation variants and verifies tags 1-4 produce landscape output
Description: Uploads Landscape_1 through Landscape_8. For tags 1-4: downloads L/XL tier, reads dimensions, asserts width > height (landscape). Tags 1-4 don't swap dimensions.
Failure Means: Pipeline incorrectly swapping dimensions for mirror/180° operations

Test Name: Orientations 5-8 served as portrait
Action: Verifies tags 5-8 (90°/270° rotations) produce portrait output
Description: For tags 5-8: downloads L/XL tier, reads dimensions, asserts height > width (portrait). These tags involve dimension-swapping rotations.
Failure Means: Images appear sideways — 90°/270° rotation not applied

Test Name: Orientation 6 API dimensions display-corrected
Action: Uploads 6000x4000 with orientation 6, checks OriginalWidth <= OriginalHeight
Description: Uploads high-res orientation-6 image. Queries API. Asserts OriginalWidth <= OriginalHeight (portrait).
Failure Means: API clients get wrong dimensions for layout calculations

Test Name: Orientation 6 portrait across all tiers
Action: Fetches all tiers and verifies height >= width
Description: Queries !sizedetails. Asserts height >= width for every non-original tier.
Failure Means: Some tiers generated without orientation correction

Test Name: Orientation 6 renders as portrait in Lightbox
Action: Opens Lightbox, checks rendered image is portrait
Description: Navigates to WebUri. Finds img element. Asserts naturalHeight > naturalWidth.
Failure Means: Browser/Lightbox ignores orientation correction

Test Name: Orientation 6 thumbnail is portrait in gallery
Action: Opens gallery page, checks thumbnail is portrait
Description: Navigates to album gallery page. Clicks image. Finds thumbnail img. Asserts height > width.
Failure Means: Gallery shows sideways thumbnails

Test Name: !metadata returns all key EXIF fields
Action: Checks for 7 required fields using alternate key names
Description: Uploads metadata-rich.jpg. Queries !metadata. Checks Make/Model/ExposureTime/FNumber/ISO/FocalLength/DateTimeOriginal with alternate names. Requires all 7 present.
Expected Values: All 7 fields found (Make=Canon, Model=EOS 6D Mark II, ISO=100, FocalLength=105)
Failure Means: Metadata parsing drops fields — blank entries in photo info panel

Test Name: !metadata for stripped image returns without error
Action: Queries !metadata for stripped image and verifies no camera fields
Description: Uploads metadata-stripped.jpg. Queries !metadata. Asserts no camera fields present and no error.
Expected Values: No camera fields; no HTTP error
Failure Means: API crashes when metadata is missing

Test Name: Format field matches uploaded file format
Action: Checks Format field contains jpg
Description: Queries image record. Asserts Format contains 'jpg'.
Failure Means: Format misidentification causes wrong content-type headers

Test Name: FileName preserves original filename
Action: Checks FileName field matches exactly
Description: Queries image record. Asserts FileName = 'metadata-rich.jpg'.
Failure Means: Filename mangled during upload

Test Name: KeywordArray round-trips correctly
Action: PUTs keywords, GETs image, verifies all returned
Description: PUTs KeywordArray: ['sunset','ocean','HDR']. GETs image. Asserts all 3 present.
Failure Means: Keywords lost during write/read cycle — breaks search

Test Name: Title/Caption round-trip with special characters
Action: PUTs unicode title/caption, verifies exact match
Description: PUTs title with emojis/accents and caption with CJK/quotes. GETs image. Asserts exact match.
Expected Values: Exact unicode match including 🌅 and 日本語
Failure Means: Encoding bugs mangle non-ASCII text

Test Name: !regions returns face/object regions for XMP image
Action: Uploads XMP regions image, queries !regions, validates Face type
Description: Uploads c-metadata-xmp-regions.jpg. Waits 5s. Queries !regions. Asserts at least 1 region with Type='Face'. Skips if no regions returned.
Failure Means: XMP face region parsing broken — people search won't work

Test Name: Camera make and model preserved (value match)
Action: Compares API Make/Model against source EXIF values
Description: Uploads metadata-rich.jpg. Reads source EXIF with exifr. Queries !metadata. Compares Make and Model (case-insensitive contains).
Expected Values: Make=Canon, Model contains EOS 6D Mark II
Failure Means: Pipeline strips or alters manufacturer identification

Test Name: Exposure settings preserved (value match)
Action: Compares API ExposureTime and ISO against source values
Description: Queries !metadata. Asserts ExposureTime matches source (numeric). Asserts ISO matches source.
Failure Means: Core shooting parameters lost

Test Name: Focal length preserved (value match)
Action: Compares API FocalLength against source value
Description: Queries !metadata. Parses FocalLength. Asserts matches source (±1).
Failure Means: Lens data lost — photographers can't filter by focal length

Test Name: DateTimeOriginal preserved (date match)
Action: Compares API date against source year/month/day
Description: Queries !metadata. Checks DateTimeOriginal contains correct year (2021), month (05), day (04).
Failure Means: Photo timeline and sorting broken

Test Name: GPS coordinates preserved (4 decimal places)
Action: Compares API Latitude/Longitude against source GPS
Description: Queries image record. Compares Latitude/Longitude against source exifr values using toBeCloseTo(4 decimals).
Failure Means: Geotagging data lost — map features broken

Test Name: GPS matches between image and metadata endpoints
Action: Cross-validates GPS between image object and !metadata
Description: Queries both endpoints. If image has non-zero Latitude, asserts !metadata agrees within 0.01°.
Failure Means: Inconsistent GPS between API endpoints

Test Name: Lens info preserved (focal numbers match)
Action: Compares API lens string against source focal length numbers
Description: Queries !metadata for LensModel/LensInfo. Extracts numbers. Asserts source focal length numbers are present in API string.
Failure Means: Lens identification lost

Test Name: White balance preserved
Action: Verifies WhiteBalance defined if present in source
Description: Queries !metadata. If source has WhiteBalance, asserts API returns it.
Failure Means: White balance data stripped

Test Name: Flash status preserved
Action: Verifies Flash defined if present in source
Description: Queries !metadata. If source has Flash, asserts API returns it.
Failure Means: Flash data stripped

Test Name: Copyright field preserved (exact match)
Action: Compares API Copyright against source value
Description: Queries !metadata. Asserts Copyright matches source exactly.
Failure Means: Copyright stripped — legal implications for photographers

Test Name: Artist/Author field preserved (exact match)
Action: Compares API Artist against source value
Description: Queries !metadata. Asserts Artist/Author matches source exactly.
Failure Means: Attribution data lost

Test Name: IPTC caption preserved as Caption (content match)
Action: Compares API Caption against source IPTC caption
Description: Uploads metadata-iptc.jpg. Reads source IPTC with exifr. Queries image record. Asserts Caption contains source caption.
Expected Values: Caption contains source IPTC caption text
Failure Means: IPTC captions lost during upload

Test Name: IPTC keywords preserved as Keywords (all present)
Action: Verifies all source IPTC keywords present in API KeywordArray
Description: Uploads metadata-iptc.jpg. Reads source keywords. Queries image record. Asserts all source keywords present.
Expected Values: All keywords present: Lab, ball, dog, grass
Failure Means: IPTC keywords lost — search broken

Test Name: UserComment EXIF field preserved
Action: Compares API UserComment against source value
Description: Queries !metadata. If source has UserComment, asserts API contains it (encoding prefix stripped).
Failure Means: Free-text notes stripped

Test Name: Lightbox info panel shows camera make/model
Action: Opens Lightbox and asserts camera brand name visible in page text
Description: Uploads metadata-rich.jpg. Navigates to WebUri. Clicks image into Lightbox. Presses 'i'. Asserts page contains Canon/EOS/Nikon/Sony.
Expected Values: Camera brand name found in page text
Failure Means: Info panel not rendering camera data

Test Name: Lightbox info panel shows exposure settings
Action: Checks page text for f-stop/ISO/shutter patterns
Description: Opens Lightbox info panel. Scans for f/N, ISO NNN, 1/N, or Nsec patterns.
Failure Means: Exposure settings not displayed to users

Test Name: Lightbox info panel shows focal length
Action: Checks page text for Nmm pattern
Description: Opens Lightbox info panel. Scans for number followed by 'mm'.
Failure Means: Focal length not displayed

Test Name: Lightbox info panel shows date taken
Action: Checks page text for date patterns
Description: Opens Lightbox info panel. Scans for 2021, May, or 05/04.
Failure Means: Date taken not displayed

Test Name: Lightbox shows GPS when Geography enabled
Action: Checks page text for location references
Description: Opens Lightbox info panel. Scans for Map, Location, decimal coords, or Yosemite.
Failure Means: GPS/location not displayed when enabled

Test Name: Lightbox hides GPS when Geography disabled [VISITOR]
Action: PATCHes album Geography=false then verifies visitor cannot see GPS
Description: PATCHes album Geography: false. Opens visitor browser context. Navigates to Lightbox. Asserts NO GPS/Map/Location text.
Expected Values: No location text visible to visitor
Failure Means: Privacy setting not enforced — visitors see location

Test Name: Lightbox hides GPS when site-level GPS off [VISITOR]
Action: PATCHes user Geography=false then verifies visitor cannot see GPS
Description: PATCHes user Geography: false. Opens visitor context. Checks Lightbox. Restores setting after.
Expected Values: No location text visible to visitor
Failure Means: Site-level privacy not enforced

Test Name: EXIF hidden when gallery EXIF setting is off [VISITOR]
Action: PATCHes album EXIF=false then verifies visitor cannot see camera info
Description: PATCHes album EXIF: false. Verifies setting applied. Opens visitor context. Asserts no f/N, ISO NNN, Nmm, Canon, Nikon patterns.
Expected Values: No EXIF patterns visible to visitor
Failure Means: Camera info visible despite privacy setting

Test Name: Stripped image info panel displays without defects
Action: Registers error listener before navigation then verifies no JS errors
Description: Registers pageerror listener. Uploads metadata-stripped.jpg. Opens Lightbox. Verifies image loads (naturalWidth > 0). Asserts zero page errors.
Failure Means: Missing metadata causes JavaScript exceptions

Test Name: All LargestSize settings cap visitor tiers [VISITOR]
Action: Sets each of 9 cap levels via API and verifies visitor tiers respect each
Description: Uploads high-res image. Creates visitor API client. For each cap (Medium through 5K): PATCHes album, queries !sizedetails as visitor, asserts largest tier <= cap pixels.
Expected Values: Medium=600, Large=800, XLarge=1024, X2Large=1280, X3Large=1600, X4Large=2048, X5Large=2560, 4K=3840, 5K=5120
Failure Means: Resolution cap not enforced — visitors access higher-res than intended

Test Name: Owner can download full resolution despite cap
Action: Sets cap to Medium then verifies owner archived download is full-res
Description: PATCHes LargestSize=Medium (600px). Downloads ArchivedUri. Verifies dimensions match source exactly.
Failure Means: Cap incorrectly applied to owners — can't access own images

Test Name: Owner archived download is full resolution
Action: Downloads ArchivedUri and verifies dimensions match source file
Description: Downloads archived file. Reads dimensions with sharp. Asserts match against source metadata.
Failure Means: Archive pipeline resizing originals

Test Name: Lightbox image respects resolution cap [VISITOR]
Action: Sets LargestSize=XLarge then opens visitor Lightbox and checks dimensions
Description: PATCHes LargestSize=XLarge (1024px). Opens visitor browser. Navigates to WebUri. Reads img naturalWidth/Height. Asserts longest edge <= 1024.
Failure Means: Cap bypassed at browser level

Test Name: HEIC with text overlay converts to viewable JPEG tiers
Action: Uploads HEIC with text and verifies tier is valid JPEG
Description: Uploads text-over-image.heic (8.5MB portrait with text). Waits for tiers. Downloads tier. Verifies JPEG magic bytes and positive dimensions.
Failure Means: HEIC conversion fails for text overlay images — broken display

Test Name: Converted image preserves portrait orientation
Action: Checks OriginalHeight > OriginalWidth
Description: Queries API image record. Asserts height > width.
Failure Means: Orientation lost during HEIC→JPEG conversion

Test Name: All size tiers maintain portrait aspect ratio
Action: Verifies height >= width at every tier
Description: Queries !sizedetails. Asserts height >= width for all non-original tiers.
Failure Means: Some tiers lose orientation

Test Name: Text sharpness preserved in converted L tier
Action: Downloads L tier and measures Laplacian variance (threshold > 500)
Description: Downloads L tier. Converts to greyscale. Computes Laplacian variance.
Failure Means: Text blurred during conversion — screenshots/documents unreadable

Test Name: Archived original is downloadable and valid
Action: Compares ArchivedSize and downloaded byte count against source
Description: Reads ArchivedSize from API. Downloads ArchivedUri. Asserts size matches.
Failure Means: Original HEIC corrupted or inaccessible

Test Name: Watermark present on visitor-facing tiers [VISITOR]
Action: Enables watermark then compares owner vs visitor tier MD5
Description: Enables Watermark on album. Downloads L tier as owner (clean). Downloads same tier as visitor. Compares MD5. Asserts they differ.
Failure Means: Watermarks silently stopped being applied — no protection

Test Name: Owner download has no watermark (MD5 matches source)
Action: Downloads ArchivedUri as owner and compares MD5 against source
Description: Downloads archived original. Computes MD5. Compares against source file MD5.
Failure Means: Watermark permanently burned into original — master copy destroyed

Test Name: Archived original has no watermark
Action: Checks ArchivedSize matches source file byte count
Description: Reads ArchivedSize from API. Compares against source byte count.
Failure Means: Original file modified during storage

Test Name: Watermark applied at both small and large sizes [VISITOR]
Action: Downloads small and large tiers as owner and visitor and verifies both differ
Description: Enables watermark. Downloads Th/S and L/XL as owner and visitor. Compares MD5 for each size.
Expected Values: Both small and large visitor tiers differ from owner
Failure Means: Watermark only at certain sizes — bypass possible

Test Name: All tiers have watermark applied [VISITOR]
Action: Downloads every tier as owner and visitor and counts watermarked tiers
Description: Enables watermark. For each non-original tier: downloads as owner and visitor, compares MD5. Asserts at least some differ.
Failure Means: Specific tiers missing watermarks — bypass path exists

Test Name: Point of Interest tests (disabled)
Action: !pointofinterest API returns null for all images
Description: All 5 POI tests disabled. The API endpoint returns null regardless of image content. POI cannot be set via API (PATCH silently ignored, PUT/POST return 405). Needs UI automation or face detection feature enabled.
Failure Means: N/A
